sizing_rule.note: Van Tharp's money management principle: risk fixed 0.5% per trade (max_risk_per_trade_pct parameter); initial protection set at 1.0% of entry price to define stop distance; position size derived from: (max_risk_pct / initial_protection_pct) = 0.5% / 1.0% = 0.5% of starting capital per trade. Entry requires trade signal + stop at ≤1.0% of entry price.

source_rule_text: Position sizing must incorporate two factors from the snow fight metaphor: initial protection level and starting capital allocation, because money management (not entry selection) is the primary driver of trading performance.
